workflows.title: Inbox Triage Pack
workflows.purpose: Turn inbox context into a reviewable triage and draft response pack.

workflows.title: LinkedIn Update Pack
workflows.purpose: Prepare profile and content update scaffolds for owned LinkedIn accounts.
workflows.notes: No mass outreach or deceptive behavior.

workflows.title: CV Update Pack
workflows.purpose: Prepare a CV revision pack for a target role.

workflows.title: Outreach Draft Pack
workflows.purpose: Prepare a reviewable outbound message draft for a legitimate owned-account workflow.

workflows.title: GitHub Profile Refresh Pack
workflows.purpose: Plan updates for GitHub profile and project presentation.

workflows.title: Notion Update Plan
workflows.purpose: Plan a structured Notion update without touching the live workspace yet.

workflows.title: Internship Application Pack
workflows.purpose: Prepare a structured application pack for an internship or junior-role opportunity.

workflows.title: Portfolio Case Study Pack
workflows.purpose: Prepare a case-study outline and asset plan for portfolio or GitHub presentation work.
approval_points: updating live profile or portfolio assets

workflows.title: Showcase Case Study Pack
workflows.purpose: Generate a polished showcase case-study scaffold for internship, recruiter, or portfolio review.
approval_points: claiming capabilities that are not verified
workflows.notes: Keep claims grounded in what is live.

workflows.title: Portfolio Project Page Pack
workflows.purpose: Generate a portfolio project page scaffold from a project summary and stack overview.
workflows.notes: Scaffold only. Human review should confirm accuracy.
